content_fingerprint: n8n publishes practical guide to production grade rag pipelines n8n s latest blog post walks builders through advanced retrieval augmented generation techniques from raw data cleaning to agentic retrieval logic with implementation patterns suited to production deployments the n8n team has published a detailed guide on advanced rag retrieval augmented generation techniques authored jointly with yulia dmitrievna and posted may 7 2026 the piece covers data cleaning retrieval optimization and agentic ai implementation across the full llm retrieval pipeline the post is framed around helping develop
